layout.title: Casa de la Viuda
layout.description: A place to relax and enjoy the life. Book rooms, suites, and apartments at Casa de la Viuda.

hero.imageAlt: The rocky coastline and lighthouse by Casa de la Viuda
hero.eyebrow: 01 — Welcome to Casa de la Viuda
hero.title: Great Experiences at Casa de la Viuda
hero.subtitle: A place to relax and enjoy the life

about.paragraphOne: Since 1986, Casa de la Viuda has welcomed guests to a quiet stretch of coastline built around a single idea: a place to relax and enjoy the life. Every room and suite is designed for slow mornings and long evenings by the water.
about.paragraphTwo: From the poolside cabanas to the garden apartments, every stay comes with the same attention to detail our guests have returned for across four decades of hospitality.

cta.title: Request Your Stay at Casa de la Viuda
cta.body: Tell us your dates and party size — our team confirms every request within 24 hours.
